mapper.select: SELECT id, equip_type, check_year, check_month, detail, cycle, plan_months, check_detail, checker, check_note, check_data_before, check_data_after, data_before_note, note, user_code, reg_date FROM tb_annual_check_result WHERE check_year = #{checkYear} ORDER BY FIELD(equip_type,'변성로','침탄로','세정기','템퍼링로','기타'), detail, check_month

SELECT id, equip_type, check_year, check_month, detail, cycle, plan_months, check_detail, checker, check_note, check_data_before, check_data_after, data_before_note, note, user_code, reg_date FROM tb_annual_check_result WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_annual_check_result (equip_type, check_year, check_month, detail, cycle, plan_months, check_detail, checker, check_note, check_data_before, check_data_after, data_before_note, note, user_code) VALUES (#{equipType}, #{checkYear}, #{checkMonth}, #{detail}, #{cycle}, #{planMonths}, #{checkDetail}, #{checker}, #{checkNote}, #{checkDataBefore}, #{checkDataAfter}, #{dataBeforeNote}, #{note}, #{userCode})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_annual_check_result SET detail = #{detail}, cycle = #{cycle}, plan_months = #{planMonths}, check_detail = #{checkDetail}, checker = #{checker}, check_note = #{checkNote}, check_data_before = #{checkDataBefore}, check_data_after = #{checkDataAfter}, data_before_note = #{dataBeforeNote}, note = #{note}, user_code = #{userCode} WHERE id = #{id}
